title: [Diminishing Demises]
description: Heat radiates from a grand limestone fireplace, its carved mantle adorned with swirling motifs of waves and celestial bodies.  An enruned shadowglass obelisk rises from the center of the room, its polished surface inscribed with intricate glyphs that shimmer in the shifting light.  Windows capped with keyhole arches line the western wall, their stained-glass patterns casting rippling reflections across the smooth stone floor.  Shadows dance, caught between the flickering fire and fractured light.
